Manager CW Bot
  • Handler database and subscribe operations

Handler database and subscribe operations

Handler DB and SUB operations

Module for control the database.

class handler_db_sub_operations.HandlerDB[source]

Handler-class for manage database.

static add_new_promo_code(promo, num_uses, type_promo)[source]

Function for add a new promo code from admin. | Admin control.

Parameters:

  • promo (str) – A new promo code.

  • num_uses (int) – Number of uses the promo code.

  • type_promo (str) – Type of the promo code.

Returns:

Result | Data of promo.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static check_promo_code(promo)[source]

Get and check promo code from database.

Parameters:

promo (str) – Promo code from user.

Returns:

Result | Data of promo.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static check_refund_token(message)[source]

Check (look for) refund token from database.

Parameters:

message (Message | CallbackQuery) – Message from user | Callback Query.

Returns:

REF-Token or False (otherwise).

Return type:

str | bool

static check_subscription(message)[source]

Check subscription by message from user.

Parameters:

message (Message | CallbackQuery) – Message from user | Callback Query.

Returns:

tuple.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static check_subscription_by_refund_token(refund_token)[source]

Check subscription by refund token from user.

Parameters:

refund_token (str) – REF-token.

Returns:

Data.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static delete_promo_code(promo)[source]

Function for delete a promo code from admin. | Admin control.

Parameters:

promo (str) – A promo code.

Returns:

Result of delete a promo code.

Return type:

bool

static delete_record_for_subscribe(ref_token)[source]

Delete a record from database | Manager Plus Subscription.

Parameters:

ref_token (str) – REF-token.

Returns:

Result of delete.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static get_data(file_path='bot.json')[source]

Get data of the Alex’s Manager Bot.

Parameters:

file_path – File Path of JSON-API-keys for Bot.

Returns:

Dict with data.

Return type:

dict

static get_ticket_data(username, markup)[source]

Get ticket data.

Parameters:

  • username (str) – User’s name – username.

  • markup (InlineKeyboardMarkup) – Markup.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

InlineKeyboardMarkup | str

static get_users_tickets_for_admin()[source]

Get ticket data.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

InlineKeyboardMarkup | str

static insert_new_record_for_subscribe(message, days, token_successful_payment='PROMO', promo='none')[source]

Insert a new record to database | Manager Plus Subscription.

Parameters:

  • message (Message | CallbackQuery) – Message from user.

  • days (int) – Count of days for use PLUS.

  • token_successful_payment (str) – Token of successful payment.

  • promo (str) – A promo code.

Returns:

bool.

Return type:

bool

static show_promo_datas()[source]

Show promo datas from database without authorization.

Returns:

PROMO Data.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static sub_promo_code(promo)[source]

Subtract the number of subscription uses.

Parameters:

promo (str) – Promo code.

Returns:

Result | Data of promo.

Return type:

bool | tuple

static update_analytic_datas()[source]

Update analytic datas.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

class handler_db_sub_operations.SubOperations[source]

Operations for manage subscription.
